blogPosts.title: The Secrets of Perfect Pizza Dough
blogPosts.content: Muhammad Haris, founder of VEE BITE, explains that our signature dough is fermented for a full 24 hours to achieve the perfect golden-brown bubbles, crispy under-carriage, and heavy elastic mozzarella cheese pull. Sourcing fresh raw ingredients daily forms the absolute foundation of our premium fast food promise in Gujranwala.
blogPosts.author: Muhammad Haris

blogPosts.title: The Golden Zinger Evolution
blogPosts.content: What makes a zinger truly premium? It is all in the double-hand-breading. At VEE BITE, we marinate our prime cut chicken breasts in a balanced, heat-controlled blend of 11 traditional spices, then fry them inside our sealed industrial high-temperature pressure fryers. The result is a crunch so crisp it can be heard across Model Town!
blogPosts.author: Muhammad Haris

inquiries.name: Ahmad Ali
inquiries.message: Assalam o Alaikum! Do you offer home delivery or catering for corporate events in Model Town, Gujranwala? We are planning a party for 20 guests next Saturday.

inquiries.message: Your Double Stuffed Crust Chicken Special Pizza is absolutely out of this world! Excellent service and very fast delivery.

pages.title: Home
pages.announcement: 🔥 FREE DELIVERY on all orders above Rs. 1500 across Model Town, Gujranwala!

pages.title: Our Story
pages.storyContent: Founded in 2023, VEE BITE was built through hard work, absolute dedication, and a struggle to serve premium-quality fast food at affordable rates in Gujranwala. Starting with a humble kitchen, Muhammad Haris' passion for crispy zingers, loaded pizza fries, and dual cheese stuffed crust pizzas has turned VEE BITE into a localized luxury culinary brand. Eat Good, Feel Good represents our absolute commitment to quality ingredients, authentic taste, and elite hospitality.
